concerns.text: The spec contains a surviving '[NEEDS CLARIFICATION]' marker in the Assumptions section: 'If the dataset lacks specific interaction variables (e.g., post-task anxiety/rumination analogs)...'. This marker violates the convergence requirement that a spec must not carry unresolved clarification flags. The example 'post-task anxiety/rumination' is also a hallucinated artifact from a different domain (psychology) and must be replaced with a materials-science relevant fallback or removed.
